title: stelis bicornis
intro: Stelis bicornis, also known as the two-horned stelis, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its unique two-horned shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis bicornis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. Stelis bicornis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
